assignment_explanation.description: For started datafeeds only, contains messages relating to the selection of a node.

search.count.description: The number of searches run by the datafeed.

search.time.description: The total time the datafeed spent searching, in milliseconds.

search.bucket_avg.description: The average search time per bucket, in milliseconds.

search.exp_avg_hour.description: The exponential average search time per hour, in milliseconds.

node.id.description:
The unique identifier of the assigned node.
For started datafeeds only, this information pertains to the node upon which the datafeed is started.

node.name.description:
The name of the assigned node.
For started datafeeds only, this information pertains to the node upon which the datafeed is started.

node.ephemeral_id.description:
The ephemeral identifier of the assigned node.
For started datafeeds only, this information pertains to the node upon which the datafeed is started.

node.address.description:
The network address of the assigned node.
For started datafeeds only, this information pertains to the node upon which the datafeed is started.
